word: H2688 - חַצְצֹון תָּמָר - Chatsᵉtsôwn Tâmâr - khats-ets-one' taw-mawr' - Hazezon-tamar

sections.paragraph:
חצצן תּמר    חצצון תּמר - chatstsôn tâmâr chatsătsôn tâmâr - khats-ets-one' taw-mawr', khats-ats-one'

From H2686 and H8558; division (that is, perhaps row) of (the palm tree; Chatsetson tamar, a place in Palestine: - Hazezon-tamar.
